# Security Policy

## Scope

This repository is a small Python library for ROS 2 Jazzy. If you believe you have found a security issue in this repository, please report it privately.

Do not open a public GitHub issue for suspected security vulnerabilities.

## Reporting

If you think you found a security issue, use one of these private contact paths:

- email: 7260230+apajon@users.noreply.github.com
- GitHub private vulnerability reporting, if it is enabled for this repository

If you are unsure whether the issue is really security-sensitive, prefer the private path first.

Include the following when possible:

- a short description of the issue
- the affected file, module, or workflow
- the conditions required to reproduce it
- the security impact you believe it may have
- a minimal proof of concept, if safe to share

## Response

This project is maintained on a best-effort basis. Reports will be reviewed when possible, and valid issues will be fixed privately first when that is practical.

## Disclosure

Please allow time for a fix before making details public.
